_comment: Example configuration for Stackwise — a fictional B2B SaaS company that sells workflow automation to ops teams at mid-market companies. Replace all values with your own.

company.name: Stackwise
company.description: Workflow automation platform for operations teams at mid-market companies (50–500 employees). Core product: visual process builder + integration layer that connects SaaS tools without code.

brand.copy_tone: direct and data-driven — no fluff, no jargon

ad_platforms._note: Export from Ads Manager: Campaigns view, all columns, last 90 days
Campaign Manager → Reporting → Export all campaigns
Not running Google Ads currently. Set enabled:true and add export_path to activate.

crm._note: Export: Contacts → All contacts → Export. Include lifecycle stage, last activity, company size, MRR fields.

email._note: Reports → Email → All emails → Export. Need: list/segment name, send count, open rate, CTR, unsubscribe rate.

outreach._note: Apollo → Sequences → Analytics → Export all sequences. Need: sequence name, reply rate, meeting booked rate, step count.

segments._comment: These segment labels MUST match the labels used in your ad naming conventions and CRM tags. A2 maps raw data to these labels.

defined_segments.description: Operations or RevOps leads at companies 100–300 employees that have outgrown spreadsheets but aren't ready for enterprise tools
Founders or CEOs at 10–50 employee companies managing operations themselves, looking for leverage
IT directors or department heads at 500+ employee companies trying to reduce shadow IT and consolidate tools
Operations or delivery leads at marketing/creative agencies managing complex multi-client workflows

scoring_weights._note: Weighted toward CRM because Stackwise is primarily inbound-driven. Adjust if you shift to outbound-heavy motion.

minimum_data_for_scoring._note: Segments with data below these minimums get confidence=low regardless of score

A4._note: A4 only runs on full pipeline cycles, not weekly refresh

A5._note: A5 only runs on full pipeline cycles. Weekly refresh skips to data.json update only.

execution._note: A5_data_only means: regenerate data.json only, skip HTML rebuild

deployment._note: Set custom_domain to your domain string if you've configured one in Cloudflare Pages

refresh_schedule._note: Monday 6am UTC. Adjust cron expression for your preferred day/time.

data_layer._note: For production teams: switch type to 'supabase' and add supabase_url + supabase_key. Local JSON is fine for solo operators and small teams.

on_success.message_template: ✅ ICP Intelligence refreshed. {{n_segments}} segments, {{n_hypotheses}} hypotheses. Dashboard: {{dashboard_url}}

on_failure.message_template: ❌ ICP refresh failed at {{failed_agent}}. Check logs: {{log_url}}
